description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in rich brown leather with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The sofa features three main seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are attached and uniformly sized, providing a cohesive and structured appearance. The armrests are broad, rounded, and padded, extending to the full height of the backrest for added comfort and support. Decorative stitching in a lighter color outlines the seams, adding a subtle visual accent to the otherwise solid upholstery. The sofa sits on short, block-style legs that are mostly recessed and minimally visible, giving it a grounded and sturdy look. Its overall design is modern yet classic, making it suitable for both indoor urban lounges and outdoor covered public spaces.
description: A large, L-shaped brown leather sectional sofa with broad, rounded armrests and uniform attached cushions. Decorative stitching and a smooth, slightly glossy finish enhance its modern, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: The L-shaped configuration and three seat/back cushions are clearly visible, along with both broad armrests and decorative stitching.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the full height of the armrest, and the attached backrest cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the continuous back panel, uniform backrest cushions, and subtle stitching details.
description_view_3: Opposite angle of the L-shape, emphasizing the sofa's length, the right-side armrest, and the smooth leather finish.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniformly sized seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout; all cushions are integrated and not loose.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, rounded, and padded armrests present on both ends, extending to the full height of the backrest with a smooth, continuous profile and visible decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners and mostly recessed, minimally visible, likely made of wood or plastic for sturdy support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest with three attached, uniformly sized cushions; no tufting or channeling, providing a clean and structured look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown leather with a smooth texture and visible decorative stitching along the seams; no patterned or tufted detailing.
